ReentrancyGuard.metadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.33+commit.64118f21"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[],"devdoc":{"details":"Contract module that helps prevent reentrant calls to a function. Inheriting from `ReentrancyGuard` will make the {nonReentrant} modifier available, which can be applied to functions to make sure there are no nested (reentrant) calls to them. Note that because there is a single `nonReentrant` guard, functions marked as `nonReentrant` may not call one another. This can be worked around by making those functions `private`, and then adding `external` `nonReentrant` entry points to them. TIP: If you would like to learn more about reentrancy and alternative ways to protect against it, check out our blog post https://blog.openzeppelin.com/reentrancy-after-istanbul/[Reentrancy After Istanbul].","kind":"dev","methods":{},"version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/security/ReentrancyGuard.sol":"ReentrancyGuard"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@openzeppelin/contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/",":ds-test/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/forge-std/lib/ds-test/src/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/",":openzeppelin/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/security/ReentrancyGuard.sol":{"keccak256":"0xa535a5df777d44e945dd24aa43a11e44b024140fc340ad0dfe42acf4002aade1","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://41319e7f621f2dc3733511332c4fd032f8e32ad2aa7fd6f665c19741d9941a34","dweb:/ipfs/QmcYR3bd862GD1Bc7jwrU9bGxrhUu5na1oP964bDCu2id1"]}},"version":1}

of synthetic tokens to burn","ticker":"Stock ticker"}},"depositAndMint(string,uint256,uint256)":{"details":"Fixes GOO-177: eth_call simulations of sequential depositCollateral+mint calls      returned false InsufficientCollateral reverts because state from the deposit      simulation was not visible to the separate mint simulation. This combined      function allows the full flow to be simulated as a single eth_call.","params":{"collateralAmount":"G$ to deposit as collateral (18 decimals)","syntheticAmount":"Synthetic tokens to mint (18 decimals = 1 share)","ticker":"Stock ticker"}},"getCollateralRatio(address,string)":{"returns":{"ratio":"Collateral ratio in BPS; type(uint256).max if no debt"}},"getMintRequirements(address,string,uint256,uint256)":{"details":"Use this for eth_call simulations instead of simulating the full mint flow.      Passing additionalCollateral lets the frontend account for a pending deposit      in the same simulation without needing a sequential two-call approach.","params":{"additionalCollateral":"Extra G$ the user would deposit before minting (may be 0)","syntheticAmount":"Tokens to mint (1e18 = 1 share)","ticker":"Stock ticker","user":"Position owner"},"returns":{"available":"        Collateral available after accounting for existing debt and pending deposit","canMint":"          True if available >= requiredCollateral","fee":"              G$ fee charged from wallet (not from collateral)","requiredCollateral":"Minimum collateral backing needed for this mint at 150% CR"}},"liquidate(address,string)":{"details":"Caller must hold sufficient synthetic tokens to repay the full debt.      Caller receives the debt value in G$ plus a 10% bonus; remainder goes      to the fee splitter (funds UBI).","params":{"ticker":"Stock ticker","user":"Address of the position owner to liquidate"}},"mint(string,uint256)":{"params":{"syntheticAmount":"Amount of synthetic tokens to mint (1e18 = 1 share)","ticker":"Stock ticker"}},"registerAsset(string,address)":{"params":{"syntheticAsset":"Address of the SyntheticAsset ERC-20","ticker":"String ticker (e.g., \"AAPL\")"}},"withdrawCollateral(string,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"G$ amount to withdraw","ticker":"Stock ticker"}}},"stateVariables":{"MIN_DEPOSIT":{"details":"Minimum 0.001 GDT (1e15 wei). Guards against accidental USDC-scaled deposits      (e.g. passing 500_000_000 for \"500 USDC\" when vault expects 18-decimal GDT)."}},"version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"LIQUIDATION_BONUS_BPS()":{"notice":"Liquidator bonus expressed as percentage of the repaid debt value (10%)"},"LIQUIDATION_RATIO()":{"notice":"Collateral ratio below which liquidation is allowed (120%)"},"MIN_COLLATERAL_RATIO()":{"notice":"Minimum collateral ratio to open a position (150%)"},"TRADE_FEE_BPS()":{"notice":"Mint/burn fee in basis points (0.3%)"},"acceptAdmin()":{"notice":"Step 2 of the two-step admin transfer.         Must be called by the previously proposed admin."},"burn(string,uint256)":{"notice":"Burn synthetic tokens and release collateral proportionally."},"collateral(address,bytes32)":{"notice":"user -> ticker key -> collateral deposited (G$ with 18 decimals)"},"debt(address,bytes32)":{"notice":"user -> ticker key -> synthetic tokens minted (18 decimals = 1 share)"},"depositAndMint(string,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Deposit collateral and immediately mint synthetic tokens in one transaction."},"getCollateralRatio(address,string)":{"notice":"Get the collateral ratio for a user's position (in BPS, e.g. 15000 = 150%)"},"getMintRequirements(address,string,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Preview a mint: returns collateral/fee requirements and whether the user         can mint now (with optional pending collateral deposit included)."},"getPosition(address,string)":{"notice":"Get position info for a user"},"liquidate(address,string)":{"notice":"Liquidate an undercollateralized position."},"mint(string,uint256)":{"notice":"Mint synthetic stock tokens against deposited collateral."},"oracleKeys(bytes32)":{"notice":"ticker key -> oracle key (same by default, but separable)"},"pendingAdmin()":{"notice":"Pending admin for two-step admin transfer (GOO-493)."},"registerAsset(string,address)":{"notice":"Register a synthetic asset with this vault."},"setAdmin(address)":{"notice":"Step 1 of the two-step admin transfer (GOO-493).         Sets a pending admin who must call `acceptAdmin` to complete the         transfer. Protects against accidentally transferring admin to         a wrong address."},"syntheticAssets(bytes32)":{"notice":"Registered synthetic assets: ticker key -> SyntheticAsset"},"totalCollateral(bytes32)":{"notice":"total G$ locked per ticker"},"withdrawCollateral(string,uint256)":{"notice":"Withdraw excess collateral, provided the position remains above MIN_COLLATERAL_RATIO."}},"version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/stocks/CollateralVault.sol":"CollateralVault"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@openzeppelin/contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/",":ds-test/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/forge-std/lib/ds-test/src/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/",":openzeppelin/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/security/ReentrancyGuard.sol":{"keccak256":"0xa535a5df777d44e945dd24aa43a11e44b024140fc340ad0dfe42acf4002aade1","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://41319e7f621f2dc3733511332c4fd032f8e32ad2aa7fd6f665c19741d9941a34","dweb:/ipfs/QmcYR3bd862GD1Bc7jwrU9bGxrhUu5na1oP964bDCu2id1"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol":{"keccak256":"0xe4455ac1eb7fc497bb7402579e7b4d64d928b846fce7d2b6fde06d366f21c2b3","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://cc8841b3cd48ad125e2f46323c8bad3aa0e88e399ec62acb9e57efa7e7c8058c","dweb:/ipfs/QmSqE4mXHA2BXW58deDbXE8MTcsL5JSKNDbm23sVQxRLPS"]},"src/stocks/CollateralVault.sol":{"keccak256":"0x6076df5db87191390fc7f46fcf1c95db607468575394fbe461ce5bd525b1ab53","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://cae8bda719c6b307b8d39c42252b7e995b8533b7310c83a3eee42b35cb608d4f","dweb:/ipfs/QmYQckDDbivAYmpFt2nVuRDLuNbShr7FRBdnH6RcYrds9x"]},"src/stocks/PriceOracle.sol":{"keccak256":"0xe22526d55c9634ddad2da46a70e51519e74927a154cd650c069a1989b7026d8b","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://0c3d478ea782e5e922247beb0211d10f0377e31a537136af7f52da2f84c1c06d","dweb:/ipfs/QmW4bxaTgb2XSNYxK3D43xjgbKZ3As534Zz55sBqSQZinn"]},"src/stocks/SyntheticAsset.sol":{"keccak256":"0x188351baa2b58c5e80b92af00cf16b2e463ac60ce5bac9b5980cbb9ef4596a88","license":"MIT","urls" IGoodDollarToken.metadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.33+commit.64118f21"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"spender","type":"address"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"amount","type":"uint256"}],"name":"approve","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"account","type":"address"}],"name":"balanceOf","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"to","type":"address"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"amount","type":"uint256"}],"name":"transfer","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"from","type":"address"},{"internalType":"address","name":"to","type":"address"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"amount","type":"uint256"}],"name":"transferFrom","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"CollateralVault","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Core GoodStocks contract. Users deposit G$ as collateral and mint         synthetic stock tokens at a minimum 150% collateral ratio.         Fee model: 0.3% of the USD value of each mint/burn is charged in G$         and forwarded to the UBI fee splitter (20% -> UBI pool).         Liquidation: anyone can liquidate a position whose collateral ratio         falls below LIQUIDATION_RATIO (120%). The liquidator provides the         synthetic tokens, receives debt value in G$ plus a 10% bonus,         and the remaining collateral is forwarded to the fee splitter.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/stocks/CollateralVault.sol":"IGoodDollarToken"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@openzeppelin/contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/",":ds-test/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/forge-std/lib/ds-test/src/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/",":openzeppelin/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/security/ReentrancyGuard.sol":{"keccak256":"0xa535a5df777d44e945dd24aa43a11e44b024140fc340ad0dfe42acf4002aade1","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://41319e7f621f2dc3733511332c4fd032f8e32ad2aa7fd6f665c19741d9941a34","dweb:/ipfs/QmcYR3bd862GD1Bc7jwrU9bGxrhUu5na1oP964bDCu2id1"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/utils/math/Math.sol":{"keccak256":"0xe4455ac1eb7fc497bb7402579e7b4d64d928b846fce7d2b6fde06d366f21c2b3","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://cc8841b3cd48ad125e2f46323c8bad3aa0e88e399ec62acb9e57efa7e7c8058c","dweb:/ipfs/QmSqE4mXHA2BXW58deDbXE8MTcsL5JSKNDbm23sVQxRLPS"]},"src/stocks/CollateralVault.sol":{"keccak256":"0x6076df5db87191390fc7f46fcf1c95db607468575394fbe461ce5bd525b1ab53","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://cae8bda719c6b307b8d39c42252b7e995b8533b7310c83a3eee42b35cb608d4f","dweb:/ipfs/QmYQckDDbivAYmpFt2nVuRDLuNbShr7FRBdnH6RcYrds9x"]},"src/stocks/PriceOracle.sol":{"keccak256":"0xe22526d55c9634ddad2da46a70e51519e74927a154cd650c069a1989b7026d8b","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://0c3d478ea782e5e922247beb0211d10f0377e31a537136af7f52da2f84c1c06d","dweb:/ipfs/QmW4bxaTgb2XSNYxK3D43xjgbKZ3As534Zz55sBqSQZinn"]},"src/stocks/SyntheticAsset.sol":{"keccak256":"0x188351baa2b58c5e80b92af00cf16b2e463ac60ce5bac9b5980cbb9ef4596a88","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw:// documentation.text:
@dev Prevents a contract from calling itself, directly or indirectly.
 Calling a `nonReentrant` function from another `nonReentrant`
 function is not supported. It is possible to prevent this from happening
 by making the `nonReentrant` function external, and making it call a
 `private` function that does the actual work.

@dev Returns true if the reentrancy guard is currently set to "entered", which indicates there is a
 `nonReentrant` function in the call stack.

@dev Contract module that helps prevent reentrant calls to a function.
 Inheriting from `ReentrancyGuard` will make the {nonReentrant} modifier
 available, which can be applied to functions to make sure there are no nested
 (reentrant) calls to them.
 Note that because there is a single `nonReentrant` guard, functions marked as
 `nonReentrant` may not call one another. This can be worked around by making
 those functions `private`, and then adding `external` `nonReentrant` entry
 points to them.
 TIP: If you would like to learn more about reentrancy and alternative ways
 to protect against it, check out our blog post
 https://blog.openzeppelin.com/reentrancy-after-istanbul/[Reentrancy After Istanbul].
@dev Returns the largest of two numbers.
@dev Returns the smallest of two numbers.

@dev Returns the average of two numbers. The result is rounded towards
 zero.
@notice Calculates x * y / denominator with full precision, following the selected rounding direction.

@dev Returns the square root of a number. If the number is not a perfect square, the value is rounded down.
 Inspired by Henry S. Warren, Jr.'s "Hacker's Delight" (Chapter 11).
@notice Calculates sqrt(a), following the selected rounding direction.

@dev Return the log in base 2, rounded down, of a positive value.
 Returns 0 if given 0.

@dev Return the log in base 2, following the selected rounding direction, of a positive value.
 Returns 0 if given 0.

@dev Return the log in base 10, rounded down, of a positive value.
 Returns 0 if given 0.

@dev Return the log in base 10, following the selected rounding direction, of a positive value.
 Returns 0 if given 0.

@dev Return the log in base 256, following the selected rounding direction, of a positive value.
 Returns 0 if given 0.
@dev Standard math utilities missing in the Solidity language.

@title CollateralVault
 @notice Core GoodStocks contract. Users deposit G$ as collateral and mint
         synthetic stock tokens at a minimum 150% collateral ratio.
         Fee model: 0.3% of the USD value of each mint/burn is charged in G$
         and forwarded to the UBI fee splitter (20% -> UBI pool).
         Liquidation: anyone can liquidate a position whose collateral ratio
         falls below LIQUIDATION_RATIO (120%). The liquidator provides the
         synthetic tokens, receives debt value in G$ plus a 10% bonus,
         and the remaining collateral is forwarded to the fee splitter.
@notice Minimum collateral ratio to open a position (150%)
@notice Collateral ratio below which liquidation is allowed (120%)
@notice Liquidator bonus expressed as percentage of the repaid debt value (10%)
@notice Mint/burn fee in basis points (0.3%)
@notice Pending admin for two-step admin transfer (GOO-493).
@notice user -> ticker key -> collateral deposited (G$ with 18 decimals)
@notice user -> ticker key -> synthetic tokens minted (18 decimals = 1 share)
@notice total G$ locked per ticker
@notice Registered synthetic assets: ticker key -> SyntheticAsset
@notice ticker key -> oracle key (same by default, but separable)

@notice Step 1 of the two-step admin transfer (GOO-493).
         Sets a pending admin who must call `acceptAdmin` to complete the
         transfer. Protects against accidentally transferring admin to
         a wrong address.

@notice Step 2 of the two-step admin transfer.
         Must be called by the previously proposed admin.

@dev Minimum 0.001 GDT (1e15 wei). Guards against accidental USDC-scaled deposits
      (e.g. passing 500_000_000 for "500 USDC" when vault expects 18-decimal GDT).

@notice Get the collateral ratio for a user's position (in BPS, e.g. 15000 = 150%)
 @return ratio Collateral ratio in BPS; type(uint256).max if no debt
@notice Get position info for a user

@dev Compute the available collateral and canMint flag.
      Extracted from `getMintRequirements` to reduce stack depth for forge coverage.

@dev Compute the required collateral and fee for a mint.
      Extracted from `getMintRequirements` to reduce stack depth for forge coverage.
@notice How much collateral is currently committed to backing active debt
@notice Minimal Chainlink AggregatorV3 interface
@notice ticker → Chainlink feed address
@notice ticker → manually overridden price (used in testing / fallback)
@notice ticker → whether manual price is active
@notice Maximum age for a price to be considered fresh (default 1 hour)
@notice Remove a price feed
@notice Update maximum price age
@notice Transfer admin
@notice Get price by pre-hashed key (gas efficient for internal callers)
@notice Check if a ticker has a registered feed
@notice The only address permitted to mint and burn tokens (CollateralVault)

@notice One-time initializer for EIP-1167 clone instances.
         Reverts if called on a directly-deployed contract (minter already set).
